mainEntity.name: What is the 180-day deadline for reporting a machine accident injury in Utah workers' comp?
mainEntity.text: What is the 180-day deadline for reporting a machine accident injury in Utah workers' comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Utah, you must report a work injury to your employer within 180 days of the accident or illness occurrence. Failure to file a report within this period may forfeit your right to workers' compensation benefits.[4]

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah law requires reporting machine accident injuries to your employer promptly, but the strict 180-day deadline from the injury date is critical. Employers must then submit the First Report of Injury to the Labor Commission. Delays can lead to claim denial, even if the injury is valid. Document everything immediately and consult a workers' comp attorney in Murray or Boise to ensure compliance and protect against insurer disputes.[4][2]

name: Utah's 180-Day Reporting Deadline for Machine Accident Injuries
